note: DreamHost APPLY: install tnc-atlas-snapshot-bridge 1.0.0 (NEW, additive, scoped) -- fixes the PWA ATLAS tab reading 0 by hooking the documented tnc_pwa_snapshot filter and filling the atlas block (records_total ~1.27M, enriched, verified_pct) from the LIVE atlas-metrics.json, and attaches the throughput.json 'Throughput & Ceiling' block. Fail-soft + cached (30s/20s transients) so the 1s snapshot poll is cheap. The plugin was structure-verified (balanced braces/parens, no NUL bytes, valid Plugin Name header) before packaging. The pipe sha256-pins, backs up, atomically swaps, php -l verifies every .php, requires the Plugin Name header, activates, and AUTO-ROLLS-BACK on any failure -- so a bad file cannot 500 the site. Does NOT modify tuanichat-platform or tnc-jarvis.

tnc-atlas-snapshot-bridge.changelog: Repoint PWA atlas block to live atlas-metrics.json + attach throughput.json block. Additive/scoped.
